findings.title: Fixture allowed_state_transitions uses camelCase ruleRef and is unvalidated
findings.details: The fixture allowed_state_transitions entry used ruleRef while the contract definition used rule_ref, and the fixture sub-block was not directly validated. This was non-blocking because runtime reads the policy module and the value was correct.
findings.required_action: Rename fixture key to rule_ref or add validator assertion over fixturePermissionAuditBindingStateTransition.allowed_state_transitions.

adjudication_notes: One completed claude-opus-4-8 max read-only/no-tools review is recorded for CP00-005.
Raw P2 CP00-005-P2-01 is fixed by renaming the fixture allowed_state_transitions key to rule_ref and adding an RP00 validator assertion for that fixture sub-block.
No unresolved P0, P1, or P2 findings remain after adjudication.
